item.title: This CapCut template features @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur bouncing to GOOBA by 6ix9ine, turning a chaotic trap track into a full brainrot dance moment. GOOBA, released in 2020, is known for its aggressive delivery, simple but pun

item.title: This CapCut template features Tung Tung Tung Sahur (@tungtungmeme) dancing to the viral “I just get so nervy” audio, turning chaotic brainrot energy into a perfectly loopable meme moment. The “I just get so nervy” sound comes from a 2026 viral clip origin
